title: polycarpon tetraphyllum f. depauperatum
intro: Polycarpon tetraphyllum f. depauperatum, also known as the lesser swamp-spurrey, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Polycarpon tetraphyllum f. depauperatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
